### ❌ pitfall_001 — pitfalls

**Question:** What are the most common mistakes an AI agent would make in this codebase?
**Ground truth:** Using synchronous SQLAlchemy patterns instead of async/await in inventory-service; attempting invalid OrderStatus transitions without checking isValidTransition; not acquiring Redis distributed locks before modifying stock_quantity; confusing Maven (order-service) with Gradle (api-gateway); using the wrong environment variable names across polyglot services (DATABASE_URL vs SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL); forgetting that the API Gateway strips Authorization headers and replaces them with X-Customer-Id; not properly capturing Stripe PaymentIntents before order expiry; and direct modification of lock files (package-lock.json, go.sum) which should be auto-generated
